sentences.en: I just want to tell you how much I enjoyed your speech yesterday.
sentences.ko: 어제 네 연설 정말 좋았다고 말하고 싶었어.

sentences.en: You know, about family and being true to ourselves.
sentences.ko: 있잖아, 가족이랑 자기 자신에게 솔직해지는 거.

sentences.en: Oh, well, I'm glad it made an impact. Yeah.
sentences.ko: 아, 뭐, 영향을 줬다니 다행이다. 응.

sentences.en: I never want to look at Mom again. What happened?
sentences.ko: 엄마 다시는 보고 싶지 않아. 무슨 일이야?

sentences.en: Well, I can't really talk. She might be listening in.
sentences.ko: 글쎄, 지금 말하기 좀 그래. 엄마가 듣고 있을 수도 있어.

sentences.en: Do you know she tried to set up my girlfriend with a man?
sentences.ko: 엄마가 내 여자친구를 남자랑 소개시키려고 했던 거 알아?

sentences.en: It has to stop. You know, that's not really what I was going for.
sentences.ko: 이제 그만해야 해. 있잖아, 내가 말하려던 건 그게 아니었는데.

sentences.en: I'm a man, Michael. I'm a man.
Can I try out this yogurt? Buster, two things.
sentences.ko: 이 요거트 먹어봐도 돼? Buster, 두 가지.

sentences.en: First of all, I think it might be time for you to move out, you know?
sentences.ko: 첫째, 이제 독립할 때가 된 것 같아, 알지?

sentences.en: And secondly, you don't want to take any chances with yogurt.
sentences.ko: 둘째, 요거트는 함부로 먹으면 안 돼.

sentences.en: Mom, just let her throw it out. Hello, who's on this phone?
sentences.ko: 엄마, 그냥 버리게 해. 여보세요, 누가 전화하고 있는 거야?
